questions.question: An Abstract Data Type (ADT) is characterized primarily by which property?
options: It strictly dictates the memory allocation strategy in C++.
It exposes all internal implementation details to the compiler.
It specifies the logical behavior and operations without enforcing a specific programmatic implementation.
It relies exclusively on contiguous memory.
questions.explanation: The ADT acts as a conceptual blueprint. It exports a type and a distinct set of operational rules, entirely abstracting away how those operations are coded physically in hardware or syntax.7

questions.question: Which of the following strictly belongs to the category of linear data structures?
questions.explanation: In a linear data structure, elements are sequentially attached one after the other. Arrays enforce this by maintaining an unbroken, contiguous block of memory.8

questions.question: If an algorithm requires the extraction of BST data in perfectly sorted, ascending numerical order, which traversal is mandatory?
questions.explanation: Because a BST forces smaller values left and larger values right, an Inorder traversal (Left  Root  Right) organically processes the lowest mathematical values first, guaranteeing ascending output.43

questions.question: A Postorder recursive algorithm evaluates subtrees using which explicit sequence?
questions.explanation: Postorder strictly dictates that the overarching parent node (Root) is evaluated exclusively after completely traversing and processing both the left and right subordinate branches.43

questions.question: When writing a C++ destructor to physically unallocate and wipe an entire Binary Tree from RAM, which algorithmic traversal must govern the deletion sequence?
questions.explanation: Postorder strictly enforces a bottom-up destruction sequence. Children subtrees are explicitly freed before the parent node is evaluated. Reversing this orphans the children, inflicting massive, irrecoverable memory leaks.8

questions.question: A Postorder sequence evaluates to: 2, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 12, 15, 16, 17, 19, 20. Based strictly on the traversal mechanics, identify the overarching Root.
questions.explanation: Postorder mechanics mandate Left, Right, Root. By definition, the ultimate parent of the entire global structure cannot be evaluated until every other node in existence has been mapped, making the final printed element 20 the absolute Root.47

questions.question: If a network engineer requires a literal topological clone of a routing tree structure, which traversal guarantees perfect structural recreation when inserting into a new tree?

A Right Rotation followed by a Left Rotation.
